# PERF-182 positive: bufio.NewWriter without size followed by a large Write
lang: go
file: PERF-182-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"bufio"
	"fmt"
	"io"
)

func Write(w io.Writer) error {
	bw := bufio.NewWriter(w)
	payload := "this is a fairly long string that exceeds the default bufio writer buffer size of 4 KiB and would force repeated flushes if the buffer were not sized up front"
	if _, err := bw.WriteString(payload); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return bw.Flush()
}

func _() {
	_ = Write(nil)
	fmt.Println("ok")
}
